NIST SP 800-53 Data Retention Clause

Primary keyword: NIST SP 800-53 data retention policy template

Best for: Government vendors and security teams

Source reference: NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5 reference

Get the Full Library

Plain-English Summary

This kit helps Government vendors and security teams create a practical starting point for data retention clause under NIST SP 800-53. It can be adapted for policies, website notices, client deliverables, trust-center pages, and compliance binders.

Free Preview Clause

Regulated data is retained only as long as needed for business, legal, security, or compliance purposes and is deleted or anonymized according to schedule.

Where This Is Used

Use this in privacy notices, records policies, SaaS terms, and customer data documentation.

Checklist Preview

  • Map data categories
  • Set retention periods
  • Automate deletion where practical

Common Mistakes

  • Keeping everything forever
  • No deletion proof
  • Different teams using different rules

Full Paid Kit Includes

  • Website notice version
  • Internal policy version
  • Implementation checklist
  • Evidence and audit notes
  • Related templates
  • Metadata and verification hash

Related Templates

  • NIST SP 800-53 Access Control Policy Clause
  • NIST SP 800-53 Encryption at Rest Clause
  • NIST SP 800-53 Encryption in Transit Clause
  • NIST SP 800-53 Audit Logging Clause
  • NIST SP 800-53 Incident Response Notice Clause
  • NIST SP 800-53 Vendor Management Clause

Disclaimer

These templates are for informational and operational planning use only. They are not legal advice, do not create an attorney-client relationship, and should be reviewed by qualified counsel before relying on them for compliance.
